name: Fate Grand Order RPG (Second Zone Version and Artoria update)
description:

More character before my grand work. Uh... I'm really serious. Firstly of tonight is add some more version of our Artoria (release in tonight). Second is add some more character like Da Vinci (Adult), some fate stay night like tofu enjoyer and Illyasviel von Einzbern, but add have Koyanskaya of Dark, Wandjina, Arjuna (original). The second update will release in 29 of this month. Lastly, add more character like Nero, Beast Nero, Kingprotea, Ushiwakamaru and secret or custom character like Heathcliff (Wuthering Heights character), Catherine (Wuthering Heights character), Ade no Seimei (mythical figure in Japanese), Misaka Mikoto (i really wanted to add her into this bot and use her class as Foreigner since she was Toaru universe which was my favorite character for whole years), Yung Hua (future character from my custom bot Path of the Twin Echos RPG, if you wanted to visit just tap here)

(https://janitorai.com/characters/c2c8c50f-9e79-44a9-a4f7-b47b86148395_character-path-of-the-twin-echos-rpg-part-3-update-and-early-access) so, the update will release in 1 on new month. If i late anything like late update. I really sorry to Type Moon Fan like you guys because I'm really busy for pre adult life like grand mission.
